commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Demo SPA 路由回退修复 — 解决 Cloudflare Pages 308 重定向循环

问题: Cloudflare Pages 的 Pretty URLs 特性自动 308 重定向
/demo/index.html → /demo/, 导致 _redirects 的 200 rewrite 失效。
解决: 将 SPA 回退文件放到 /demo/ 目录之外 (demo-spa.html),
避免 /demo/* 匹配规则产生自引用循环。

commit.message:
Add CI workflow to auto-rebase company PRs on CSV conflicts

When main's data files change (e.g. another company PR merges),
open add-company/* PRs may conflict on the append-only CSVs.
This workflow auto-resolves by keeping main's rows + appending
the PR's new rows.

commit.message:
Fix receiver advertising VPN IP instead of LAN IP

_get_local_ip() used the default-route trick which picks the VPN
tunnel interface when a VPN is active. Now uses ifaddr (already a
zeroconf dep) to enumerate adapters and skip VPN/tunnel interfaces
(utun, tun, tap, ppp, etc.), falling back to the routing trick only
if no physical interface IP is found.

Also includes improved submission error message showing host:port
and the OS error string for easier diagnosis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(segment): improve workflow and add error guidance (#111)

## Summary

push)
- Require `preview_segment` tool execution before push for user approval
- Fix behavior condition pattern: use `type: Value` with `source` (not
`type: Behavior`)
- Fix filter syntax: use `type: Column` with `column` field inside
filters
- Document one-level nesting limitation (`NESTED_CONDITION_GROUP` error)
- Add `-y` flag requirement for non-interactive push
- Add Console link display after successful push
- Add local vs server validation comparison table
- Expand error code reference with solutions

## Test plan

- [x] Review skill documentation for accuracy
- [x] Verify behavior condition examples match working segments

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Multi-position TP strategy + multi-channel support

- Open 3 x 0.01 positions per signal (each with own TP) instead of 1 x 0.03
- Trail SL after TP hits: TP1->breakeven, TP2->TP1, TP3->TP2
- Limit orders now also split into 3 sub-orders with individual TPs
- Validate TPs against current market price (not signal price)
- Default fallback TPs ($2/$5/$8) when signal TPs are invalid
- Lot carry-forward when a sub-position fails to open
- Breakeven protection: reject SL edits worse than post-TP SL
- Multi-channel listener (5 channels) with per-channel state files
- Follow provider SL with $30 max cap, $10 default when missing
- UTF-8 logging for Telegram emoji content
- Position poll interval 5s for fast SL trailing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add --worker-only mode to orchestrator (#302)

Adds a `--worker-only` flag to `generacy orchestrator` that starts a
minimal server with only the WorkerDispatcher (polls Redis queue, claims
jobs, executes them via ClaudeCliWorker) and a health endpoint.

In worker mode:
- Skips label sync, label monitoring, PR feedback monitoring, Smee webhooks
- Registers only /health and /dispatch routes
- Requires Redis (fails hard if unavailable)
- Starts only the WorkerDispatcher on server ready

In full mode (default, unchanged):
- Runs all monitoring services, webhooks, full HTTP API
- Does NOT start the WorkerDispatcher (workers run in worker containers)

Also fixes webhook route tests that broke when addContentTypeParser was
moved from route files to server.ts in PR #301.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Master presenter prompt + ruthless critique agent

Content writer now has world-class presentation best practices:
- Narrative arc (context → evidence → insight → CTA)
- Headlines as complete takeaways with data, not topic labels
- Zero tolerance for placeholder text or generic content
- Every user talking point must appear in the deck
- Speaker notes are presenter scripts, not slide repeats

Critique agent upgraded to ruthless board member:
- Auto-flags and rewrites empty/placeholder slides
- Headline test: reads only headlines to check if story is clear
- Demands specific numbers on every claim
- Verifies all key messages appear as headlines

Tested with real Domo Data Integration brief — all 12 slides
populated with specific product content, stats, customer quotes.

commit.message:
fix(kyverno): add control-plane toleration for scheduling (#638)

The only viable amd64 node (kaz-k8-1) has a control-plane NoSchedule
taint. Without tolerating it, all Kyverno controllers stay Pending
after the amd64 nodeSelector is applied — k8-worker-1 is NotReady and
k8-gpu-1 has an nvidia GPU taint.

commit.message:
fix(webauthn): ROOT CAUSE — passkey saved under wrong merchantId

The register endpoint used getMerchantContext() which, for admin users,
returns the "viewing as" merchant ID from the selectedMerchantId cookie.
This caused passkeys to be saved under the WRONG merchant ID.

On next login, validate checks the admin's REAL merchant ID and finds
0 passkeys, forcing re-registration every time.

Fix: Use session.user.id directly in the register endpoint, bypassing
the "viewing as" override entirely. Passkeys must always belong to
the actual authenticated user.

commit.message:
Add Coherence as sixth aspect, reorganize aspects into three tiers

Introduce Coherence (purposefulness, connection) as a new aspect
capturing whether students can see how course elements connect —
anchored in Dimension 3's "students' views of their learning
experiences" sub-question. Reorganize the six aspects into three
tiers (Interpersonal, Structural, Environmental) with Coherence
placed mid-list to avoid capstone misreading. Update all callout
blocks to cross-reference six aspects, broaden Participatory
Climate to include peer interaction, add Carrie Langner to
contributors, and update five→six throughout all chapters.

commit.message:
Claude/add concentric selves eusociality y r6v1 (#6)

* Add concentric selves and eusociality subsection to end of 3.1

Introduces the concept that the boundary of "self" is variable, not
fixed—grounded in Levin's bioelectricity, Hamilton's rule, and
eusocial species as biological proof of concept. Reframes governance
as maintaining the signaling substrate that keeps concentric identity
rings expanded, distinguishing expanded identity (stable) from
altruism (fragile).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Add Haidt hive switch reference to concentric selves section

Introduces the "90% chimp, 10% bee" framework and collective
effervescence as the psychological mechanism bridging eusocial
biology to human governance — proof that humans carry the hardware
for eusocial coordination, with institutional software as the
variable.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Add Callahan immune-self, Boomsma monogamy, and Bear therapy refs

Three additions to the concentric selves / eusociality section:

1. Gerald Callahan (Lousy Sex) — the immune system as the biological
   mechanism for defining self, with autoimmune disease and cancer as
   the two failure modes of self-boundary discrimination

2. Boomsma monogamy hypothesis + Hughes et al. — strict lifetime
   monogamy as the structural precondition for eusociality (r=0.5
   to siblings = r to offspring), confirmed across 267 species

3. Greg Bear (Moving Mars / Slant) — nano-therapy as the cautionary
   counterpoint: you can engineer cooperative individuals without
   engineering cooperative institutions, and when the therapy breaks,
   there's no institutional substrate to fall back on

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Replace Bear fiction ref with framework-native argument

The ideas from Moving Mars (engineering cooperative individuals
doesn't produce cooperative institutions; externally maintained
cooperation is brittle) now stand on the paper's own logic and
tie back to Callahan's immune-self framework rather than citing
a novel.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Replace Hamilton's rule notation with plain English

r × B > C is opaque to anyone who doesn't already know it.
Replaced with concrete example (give up two offspring to help
sister raise five) and removed all r=0.5 notation from Boomsma
paragraph.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Replace haplodiploidy jargon with plain English

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Ground concentric selves in waves-patterns-substrate ontology

Added three paragraphs before the Levin cell discussion establishing
the deeper framework: what exists are waves in media, from which
stable patterns emerge, some of which learn to self-propagate. The
pattern is the thing (not the substrate). Self is a classification
of patterns, and this is scale-independent. Introduces Levin's
"platonic selves" and resolves Ship of Theseus explicitly.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Introduce W.D. Hamilton before stating his rule

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Make explicit that signals constitute the self, not just serve it

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

* Add sociopathy base rate and mirror neurons as evidence for coevolution claim

The low prevalence of sociopathy (~1-4%) shows coordination-signal receptors
are under strong selection pressure. Mirror neurons show the self-boundary
expansion mechanism is physiological, not merely cultural.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Af1NhAF51VfCgdLWnuHaMY

---------

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive bug fixes from full code audit (50+ bugs found, 25 fixed)

Frontend (index.html):
- CRITICAL: f0Factor wrongly applied 1.10x to RMVPE instead of 1.0
- HIGH: pollBatchItem hangs forever on paused/cancelled status — now resolves
- HIGH: batch download buttons always had blank filenames — now set correctly
- HIGH: empty model name silently defaulted to 'My Voice' — now shows error
- HIGH: duplicate model name said 'overwrite' but backend rejected — now blocks
- HIGH: startPreprocess had no guard for paused/running state — added
- MEDIUM: _batchCancelled flag added to stop in-flight batch polling on cancel
- MEDIUM: all 3 resume functions now reset _*StartTime (was showing inflated cost)
- MEDIUM: retryTraining now resets _trainStartTime
- MEDIUM: cancelled status in all 3 poll functions now shows distinct UI (not paused panel)
- MEDIUM: single file drop on existing file now replaces instead of entering batch mode
- MEDIUM: skipPreprocess now cancels active/paused RunPod job (was leaking GPU billing)
- LOW: _trainPollErrors threshold fixed from > 20 to >= 20 (consistent with others)
- LOW: train-info-status now shows Korean text instead of raw English status

Backend (server.py):
- HIGH: submit_job() KeyError guard — uses .get("id") with descriptive error
- MEDIUM: f0_method validation added to /api/train (was only on /api/convert)
- MEDIUM: malformed file_ids now returns 400 error instead of silently using all files
- LOW: cancel/pause endpoints now reject already-failed jobs
- LOW: import re moved to module level (was re-imported inside polling loop)
- LOW: _JOB_TIMEOUTS moved to module-level constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add synthesis suggestions, proposal voting, Lachenmann space, concept addendum

LLM-powered synthesis suggestions (gpt-5.2 with reasoning) analyze the full
discussion tree and propose 1-3 concrete synthesis nodes. Proposal summaries
(gpt-5-mini) distill each synthesis into a votable one-sentence statement.
Participants can Support or Oppose with justification. New seed space (Space 4)
demonstrates the full branch typology with an ensemble programming debate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Phase 8 Game Refinement — auto-activating motion-aware sprite cleanup

Integrates the proven refine_v4.py algorithms as an optional Phase 8 in
the 9-phase pipeline. Auto-activates for 2d_platformer and 2d_roguelite
game types via refinement_profile in game profile configs.

- phases/p6_refine.py: global bbox normalization, motion-aware keypose
  selection, per-animation cleanup (white smoke kill, binary alpha,
  crop, resize+sharpen)
- config/refinement_profiles/platformer_2d.json: 14 animation configs
  with tuned frame counts, action ranges, and cleanup thresholds
- main.py: 9-phase pipeline, --skip-refinement flag, auto-activation
- phases/p5_export.py: checks session["refined_frames"] first, skips
  resize for already-sized refined frames
- Game profiles: added refinement_profile key (platformer_2d or null)
- .claude/CLAUDE.md: full documentation of Phase 8, output structure,
  processed characters, and lessons learned

commit.message:
fix: fallback BM stock para FLX items donde FBA API no devuelve datos

Para Seller Flex puro, Amazon no expone inventario en FBA Inventory API.
Si `_flx_from_api=False` (FBA API no reconoce el SKU) y `bm_avail > 0`,
usar bm_avail como proxy del stock FLX — esto es el inventario real en bodega propia.

También amplía el pre-enrich BM para incluir todos los items `fulfillment_type=FLX`
(no solo los que tienen `-FLX` en el SKU, sino también los AMAZON_NA).

Implement LUC contract generator V1 (backend + frontend)

Backend:
- Pydantic models for contract data (PersonData, PropertyData, LeaseConditions)
- Jinja2 template for LUC contract with ~20 clauses from real contract
- WeasyPrint PDF generation (HTML → PDF)
- Number to words service for Spanish rent amounts
- REST API: POST /api/contracts/luc/preview, /luc/pdf, GET /modalities
- CORS middleware configured
- 36 tests passing (number_to_words, contract_renderer, API)

Frontend:
- React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + Shadcn/UI
- 4-step wizard: Parties → Property → Conditions → Review
- Zod v4 validation with Standard Schema resolver
- Live HTML preview via iframe + PDF download
- Dockerized with nginx for Railway deployment

Docs:
- Contract templates analysis from Bruno's real contracts
- Business analysis updated with real findings
- Feature documentation for LUC contract generation

* MFB-669: Consolidate HouseholdMemberForm for main and EC workflows

- Merge main and EC HouseholdMemberForm into a single unified component
- Extract reusable section components: BasicInfoSection, HealthInsuranceSection,

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* delete incorrect test"

* Address CodeRabbit review comments

- Fix hardcoded English text: replace inline JSX strings with FormattedMessage
  (householdDataBlock.questionHeader-relationship-age / -relationship)
- Fix incomplete useEffect dependency array in useHouseholdMemberFormEffects
- Fix getValues() not triggering re-renders in SpecialConditionsSection:
  use conditions prop (watched value) instead
- Fix test assertions in defaultValues.test.ts to match implementation (birthYear returns 0, not '')
- Remove duplicate formatToUSD from helpers.ts; re-export from canonical src/utils/formatCurrency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* show relationship to head when editing

* Address CR feedback: type safety, test coverage, and hasIncome persistence

- Remove dead generic T and fieldPrefix from BasicInfoSection; type to HouseholdMemberFormSchema
- Replace any props in IncomeSection with IncomeFormValues interface
- Replace any props in SpecialConditionsSection with ConditionsFormValues interface
- Type createHouseholdMemberData memberData with discriminated union (main vs EC)
- Fix getDefaultFormItems: treat explicit [] as intentional clear, not first-visit seed
- Fix hasIncome not persisting when user explicitly selects "no": read saved boolean in
  getDefaultHasIncome and skip age-based auto-override until DOB actually changes (prevBirthRef)
- Restore throw on missing uuid in formSubmitHandler
- Export EnergyCalculatorHouseholdMemberFormSchema type from schema.ts
- Add HealthInsuranceSection.test.tsx and StudentEligibilitySection.test.tsx
- Update helpers.test.ts and useHouseholdMemberFormEffects.test.ts for new behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Memoize month menu items; align EC hasIncome default with main workflow

- Wrap months object + createMenuItems in useMemo(deps: [intl]) in BasicInfoSection
  so the 12 formatMessage calls and menu item array are not recreated on every render
- Replace determineDefaultIncomeByAge in createEnergyCalculatorDefaultValues with
  getDefaultHasIncome — EC now reads the saved hasIncome boolean like the main workflow
  does, preventing the age effect from overriding an explicit "no income" choice on re-visit
- Update defaultValues.test.ts: remove mockDetermineDefaultIncomeByAge, add hasIncome
  persistence tests for both main and EC workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Scope CSS margin override with descendant selector instead of !important

Replace .previous-members-heading { margin: 0 !important } with
.previous-members-section h2.question-label { margin: 0 } to avoid
fighting global specificity. Remove now-unused previous-members-heading
class from JSX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix future-birth-month test silently skipping in December

Replace the inline if-guard with (CURRENT_MONTH === 12 ? it.skip : it)
so the test is explicitly skipped rather than passing with no assertions
when run in December.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address coderabbit review feedback

- Fix userEvent.setup() (v14 API) → userEvent.click() (v13 API) in
  HealthInsuranceSection.test.tsx and StudentEligibilitySection.test.tsx
- Replace hasIncome z.string().regex(/^true|false$/) with z.enum(['true','false'])
  in both schemas — regex was parsed as (^true)|(false$) and accepted invalid strings
- Add displayEmpty to relationship <Select> in BasicInfoSection for consistent
  placeholder rendering (matches birthMonth field)
- Add currentMemberIndex bounds check in formSubmitHandler to prevent
  writing to an invalid array index from a URL-spoofed page number
- Use renderRelationshipToHHHelperText(intl) in main schema instead of
  hardcoded string, consistent with EC schema
- Fix getDefaultFormItems to seed when existingItems=[] and no downstream
  progress — API returns [] for brand-new members, not undefined, so the
  old [] guard was incorrectly treating first visits as intentional clears

* Revert "MFB-596: Port HHM summary cards UX updates"

This reverts commit 19a01b76b193f8bb75fb21b4d37927bcf4cf439f.

* Fix first-visit income seeding for API-initialized members

The API always returns incomeStreams: [] for new members, which
getDefaultFormItems treated as an intentional clear. Normalize []
to undefined at the call site when the member hasn't progressed
through the form, so the seeding path is correctly reached.

commit.message:
Replace objdump disassembler with pure Scheme via $assembly-output

Drop the subprocess-based objdump approach in favor of Chez's built-in
$assembly-output parameter. No external dependencies, works on all
platforms, and produces symbolic assembly with labels and relocations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix all remaining audit issues: error XSS, null safety, duplicate loads

- Sanitize 25+ error message innerHTML renders with _escHtml(e.message)
- Add .catch() to showMarketProductDetail() Promise chain
- Remove duplicate admin dashboard auto-load (lines 25432-25434)
- Fix XSS in ssLookupStudent email/tel onclick handlers
- Fix 5 unsafe currentUser.nombre.split() instances (null safety)
- Sanitize user.telefono, user.ciudad, user.experiencia in lookup grids
- Sanitize Stripe dashboard error output
- Sanitize zvImportFromSupabase error output
- Sanitize zmLoadSections, adminLoadMarketProducts error output

commit.message:
Combat log: enemy swings, GCD bleed triggers, better labels

Surface bleed trigger damage from helper functions so GCD-window
bleeds appear in the log. Add enemy attack entries (orange) for
mob/boss swings. Improve labels: "Bleed trigger", "Shatter → next".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: replace FullCalendar with custom calendar in teacher dashboard

Week view: mini month calendar with colored dots + scrollable day timeline
(default 10:00-20:00, scroll 6:00-22:00). Month view: compact grid with
no extra weeks. Both views: date numbers only (centered), today badge,
distinct header/cell backgrounds, Sun=red Sat=blue coloring. Click month
cell → switches to week view for that day.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(security): address timing attack and SSRF findings from audit

- Replace !== with timingSafeEqual (Node crypto) for CRON_SECRET
  validation in nightly and cleanup cron routes
- Add XOR-based safeCompareSecrets for the Deno send-daily-brief
  edge function (timing-safe without node:crypto dependency)
- Add assertNotPrivateUrl guard in fetchFeedXml to block requests
  to localhost, loopback, RFC1918, and link-local addresses (SSRF
  defense-in-depth)
